name: Voyager — PostgreSQL → YugabyteDB live migration
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq postgresql-client && chmod +x init-voyager-postgres/prompt-import.sh init-voyager-postgres/prompt-wa.sh init-voyager-postgres/pre-step.sh && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && sudo install -m 755 .devcontainer/scripts/yb-voyager-wrapper.sh /usr/local/bin/yb-voyager && docker-compose -f init-voyager-postgres/compose.yml pull && docker pull --platform linux/amd64 yugabytedb/yb-voyager:latest && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lerocha/chinook-database/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_PostgreSql.sql -o init-voyager-postgres/chinook_data.sql && mkdir -p /workspaces/ybdb-vanguard/voyager-data /workspaces/ybdb-vanguard/ybdb/backup && echo "✅ PostgreSQL Voyager exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 1 && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && docker-compose -f init-voyager-postgres/compose.yml up -d && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → psql                (PostgreSQL source shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-export   (Voyager export shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-import   (Voyager import shell)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager-wa       (Voyager cutover shell)"'
